journal.title: Health Journal
journal.subtitle: Track your daily symptoms and health observations to get better insights over time.
journal.lockedDesc: The Health Journal is reserved for PLUS and ELITE members. Upgrade to track your health history.
journal.emptyDesc: Start logging your symptoms to build a health timeline.
journal.formNotesPlaceholder: Add more details about how you feel...

vault.title: Medical Vault
vault.subtitle: Your records are secured with medical-grade encryption. Only you can access them.
vault.sharedSubtitle: You are viewing a shared record.
vault.searchPlaceholder: Search records by name or date...
vault.recordSecuredDesc: {name} has been encrypted and uploaded to your vault.
vault.lockedDesc: The Medical Vault is reserved for PLUS and ELITE members. Upgrade to securely store your health records.
vault.emptyDesc: Your vault is empty. Upload your first medical report to begin.

appointments.title: My Appointments
appointments.subtitle: Manage your consultations and expert chats.
appointments.authRequiredDesc: Please sign in to access your secure appointment history.
appointments.noActiveSchedulesDesc: Connect with verified doctors or praticiens du bien-être to start your health journey.
appointments.chatErrorDesc: Could not start the secure chat. Please try again.

feed.subtitle: Des informations fondées sur des preuves adaptées à vos intérêts.

articles.title: Recherche & Articles

articles.contentRestrictedDesc: Full research is available to platform members.
articles.educationalProtocolDesc: This information is for educational purposes and does not replace professional medical advice.

saved.subtitle: Accédez à vos informations de santé et recherches favorites.
saved.noSavedDesc: Commencez à rechercher des sujets de santé et enregistrez-les ici pour un accès rapide.

history.title: Historique de Recherche
